appliance_mode_support.description: Indicates whether appliance mode support is enabled for the VPC attachment.

dns_support.description: Indicates whether DNS support is enabled for the VPC attachment.

id.description: The ID of the EC2 Transit Gateway VPC Attachment.

ipv6_support.description: Indicates whether IPv6 support is enabled for the VPC attachment.

security_group_referencing_support.description: Indicates whether security group referencing is supported for the VPC attachment.

subnet_ids.description: The IDs of the subnets involved in the VPC attachment.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the VPC attachment.

transit_gateway_id.description: The ID of the transit gateway associated with the VPC attachment.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC involved in the attachment.

vpc_owner_id.description: The account ID of the owner of the VPC involved in the attachment.
